@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+import mongoose,{Schema} from "mongoose";\
+
+const playlistSchema = new Schema({
+    name:{
+        type:String,
+        required:true
+    },
+       description:{
+        type:String,
+        required:true
+    },
+    videos:[{ 
+        type:Schema.Types.ObjectId,
+        ref:"Vedio",
+        required:true
+    }]
+},{timestamps:true})
+
+export const Playlist = mongoose.model("Playlist",playlistSchema)
